## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Test / CI improvement
- [ ] Dependency update

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Worker — Android (`packages/worker`)
- [ ] CLI (`packages/cli`)
- [ ] Dashboard (`apps/dashboard`)
- [ ] Shared (`packages/shared`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style of the existing codebase (TypeScript strict, Prettier defaults).
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README / inline comments) where appropriate.
- [ ] I have tested my changes against the affected platform(s) where practical.
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, credentials, or personal information.
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under the [Apache License 2.0](../LICENSE) (the project license).
